spec_match.rationale: Spectacular live round-trip WebCodecs test suite that configures VP8, H.264, and AV1 codecs, encodes sample frames, decodes them in real-time, and verifies bitstream-level pass-through.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding, user-triggered execution flow with interactive rotation selectors and real-time diagnostics for multiple encoders.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Superbly aligns with the core multimedia specifications and bitstream packaging differences.

edge_cases.rationale: Robust capability check that detects absence of VideoEncoder/Decoder and details missing codec profile supports cleanly.

references.rationale: Correctly references the W3C specification and ChromeStatus entry 5128855343595520.

design_system.rationale: Fully respects spacing, typography, margins, and borders.

summary: An exceptionally advanced and high-fidelity WebCodecs carriage testing tool. It constructs in-process pipelines for VP8, H.264, and AV1, validates orientation survival through roundtrip encoding/decoding, and gracefully reports platform profile coverage.
